## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` if the change affects a user flow
- [ ] CI is green

## Product Gate

- [ ] the feature is API-backed where needed
- [ ] route and role access are correct
- [ ] loading, empty, error, and success states were considered
- [ ] tests were added or updated for the changed behavior
- [ ] no new mock-only production path was introduced

## Risks

- known limitations
- follow-up work, if any
